'''Draigons''' were an [[Bird/Legends|avian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to an [[Unidentified blue marble planet|unknown]] [[Water/Legends|watery]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] between [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]] and [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. They ate [[Fish/Legends|fish]] from the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of their world, although this did not make up their diet entirely. Draigons were covered in [[Color/Legends|silver]] scales and had strong legs and large, single-clawed wings, along with yellow eyes and dagger-like teeth. Draigons were said to resemble flying [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Ithorian razor shark|razor sharks]].

In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], along with many [[Offworld Mining Corporation|Offworld Mining]] workers, were aboard the ship [[Monument (freighter)|''Monument'']] when the craft crash-landed on the draigon home planet. At first, Obi-Wan and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] believed the draigons to be harmless; however, they later realized this was not the case. [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] thugs, under orders from their Offworld Mining Corporation superior [[Grelb]] (who himself was following orders from his own boss, [[Jemba]]), tried to shoot Qui-Gon down from a cliff he was scaling in an attempted recovery of stolen [[dactyl]] hidden inside a cave in the cliffside. [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], after recovering a cache of [[dactyl]], jumped off the cliffside and landed on a draigon, [[Animal bond|persuading]] it to fly him down to ground level. The [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts began driving the draigons to the point of hysteria, but in their concentration and glee the Whiphids failed to notice.

Eventually, Grelb noticed that his underlings were being eaten by the now-frenzied draigons. Although he tried to escape the avian predators by squeezing into a small crevice, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] was subdued and devoured. Other draigons then attacked the [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] who were taking shelter in the caves, though with the help of Obi-Wan and Qui-Gon they were beaten off, the two Jedi killing so many of them that their piled bodies nearly blocked the cave mouth.
